headline: Hormuz peace deal shaken after reported IRGC attack on cargo ship; Oil jumps
summary: Investing.com -- Crude oil prices edged higher and caught global markets flat-footed on Thursday after Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps attacked a Singapore-flagged cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz, according to a report from the Wall Street Journal, citing two senior U.S. officials. The incident blindsided investors who had expected a period of cooling geopolitical tensions. It occurred just days after the U.S. and Iran signed a landmark agreement intended to end hostilities and fully

headline: TSX set for higher open as Micron earnings revive global technology sector
summary: Investing.com -- Canadian equity markets appeared poised for a positive open on Thursday after strong corporate earnings breathed new life into the global artificial intelligence trade. The anticipation of a higher open follows a downbeat Wednesday session where the benchmark S&P/TSX Composite fell 191.29 points, or 0.55%, to close at 34,736.09, while the S&P/TSX 60 dropped 0.30% to finish at 2,049.68. Ahead of the opening bell, S&P/TSX 60 Futures rose 0.39% to C$2,062.4. Micron Crushes Expectat

headline: Constellation Brands Q1 Earnings Preview: What to Expect?
summary: STZ heads into Q1'27 results, with earnings growth expected, beer momentum in focus and cost pressures posing risks.
